steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Ts Request Unknown Admission
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug TypeScript team handles case 5135 during a hostile XML and unknown-value admission drill. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove runtime request admission, coercion, problem details, negotiation, and OpenAPI conformance; publisher fetch and retention budgets must remain explicit; then inject one URL, DNS, redirect, stream, compression, timeout, abort, or publisher-budget failure and settle ownership. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Validate params, query, headers, body, content type, size, cardinality, and unknown fields before constructing a command.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Feed Ts Openapi Conformance
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-TypeScript function headed "// Evidence: feed-ts-openapi-conformance-185rmj" that uses case 9728 to prove runtime request admission, coercion, problem details, negotiation, and OpenAPI conformance. Keep defaults runnable and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import Node APIs, open streams or sockets, parse through native XML libraries, contact publishers, access PostgreSQL, read host files, handle real signals, leave timers, handles, or Promise rejections, or claim native runtime, load, accessibility, container, backup, restore, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with TypeScript 7.0.2, the TypeScript 6.0.2 compatibility surface, Node 24.18.0, Express 5.2.1, pg 8.22.0, fast-xml-parser 5.10.0, Zod 4.4.3, PostgreSQL 18.4, original unknown fixtures, controlled Fetch and stream adapters, emitted-runtime and subprocess tests, disposable databases, handle inspection, package and image review, accessibility, capacity, backup, restore, rollback, and release gates.

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Feed Ts Openapi Conformance.
